cells.label: cl1/2 (m-/wa-)
cells.function: human/animate, singular/plural; subject concord a-/wa-, associative wa

cells.label: cl3/4 (m-/mi-)
cells.function: plants, body parts, inanimates; sg/pl; concord u-/i-, associative wa/ya

cells.label: cl5/6 (ji-/ma-)
cells.function: augmentatives, paired things, mass; sg/pl; concord li-/ya-, associative la/ya

cells.label: cl7/8 (ki-/vi-)
cells.function: things, diminutives, manner; sg/pl; concord ki-/vi-, associative cha/vya

cells.label: cl9/10 (n-)
cells.function: animals, loanwords; sg=pl (often zero-marked); concord i-/zi-, associative ya/za

cells.label: cl11/14 (u-)
cells.function: abstract nouns, mass nouns; associative wa

conditioning: phonology (prefix allomorphy by glide formation before a vowel: m~mw cl1/3, ki~ch cl7, vi~vy cl8, mi~my cl4)

fit_none.note: cl9/10 nouns are largely zero-marked (no overt class prefix) and loanwords resist transparent prefixing — the expected residue, not a failure of the analysis

evidence_citations.stat: 888/2095 nouns classified into 8 emergent sg/pl groups
13/14 classes have a dominant associative concord marker (ki->cha .83, vi->vya .86, ji->la .80, m->wa .81)

evidence_citations.claim: a locative class exists beyond the core classes
evidence_citations.stat: residue probe: -ni recurs on 100 nouns, 51 leave an attested stem

prose: swh has a productive prefixal NOUN-CLASS system (detected, high confidence). Eight singular/plural class pairings are recovered, classifying ~42% of nouns; the rest are dominated by zero-marked cl9/10 nouns and loanwords (the expected residue). The decisive evidence is CONCORD: 13 of 14 classes trigger a dominant associative agreement marker on their modifiers (cl7 ki->cha .83, cl8 vi->vya .86, cl5 ji->la .80, cl1/2 m->wa .81), which is what distinguishes a real agreement-class system from mere orthographic prefix clustering. Prefix allomorphy is morphophonological (glide formation before vowels: m~mw, ki~ch, vi~vy). A locative class (suffix -ni, 100 nouns) surfaces in the residue probe and should be added as cl16/17/18. Recommendation to reviewer: PROMOTE the class+concord system; treat the zero-marked cl9/10 residue as data-sparse rather than contradictory.
